class.name: GDKStringVerify
class.brief_description: Xbox Services string verification service accessed via GDK.string_verify.
class.description: Wraps Xbox Services text verification APIs. Methods return one-shot completion [Signal] values that emit [GDKResult].

method.name: verify_string_async
method.description: Verifies one string. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; on success, [member GDKResult.data] is a [Dictionary] with [code]result_code[/code], [code]acceptable[/code], and [code]first_offending_substring[/code].

method.name: verify_strings_async
method.description: Verifies multiple strings. On success, [member GDKResult.data] is an [Array] of result dictionaries in service-returned order.
